sentence_reviews.text: A decoder-only transformer predicts each next token from a causally masked context, enabling scalable autoregressive pretraining, continuation, and instruction following.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Vaswani et al. Transformer decoder/masked self-attention; Deep Learning/PML autoregressive modeling context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Core mechanism is supported, but the wording adds broad foundation-model/instruction-following implications beyond one direct source.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Decoder-only causal transformers is to connect Transformers, Causal, masked & structured masking to downstream capabilities including Retrieval-augmented generation, Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning, Program synthesis & code search.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Vaswani et al. Transformer decoder/masked self-attention; Deep Learning/PML autoregressive modeling context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependency portion is supported, but the downstream capability list is graph-derived and not fully established by the cited packet sources.
